## THE ONE ACTION (inspect_only step: no source files are modified; evidence records inspection)
Import PIL, bs4, lxml in python3 and print their versions; capture real output.

## COMMAND(S) TO RUN
```bash
python3 - <<'PY'
import importlib
for m in ['PIL','bs4','lxml']:
    try:
        mod=importlib.import_module(m); print(m,'OK',getattr(mod,'__version__','n/a'))
    except Exception as e:
        print(m,'MISSING',e)
PY
```
